message:
perf(connectors): add early input validation for Discord + formatting fixes

Discord connector - early validation optimization:
Add validate_input_early() to check request validity before expensive
capability token verification:

Validation rules enforced:
- Message content must not exceed 2000 characters (Discord limit)
- Maximum 10 embeds per message (Discord limit)
- Total embed character count (title + description) must not exceed 6000
- send_message requires either content or embeds (not empty)

This prevents wasting CPU cycles on Ed25519 signature verification and
capability parsing for requests that would fail Discord's API validation
anyway. Particularly important under high request volume where invalid
requests could be used for DoS.

Validation happens synchronously before any async operations, providing
fast rejection of malformed requests.

Telegram connector - formatting consistency:
- Reorder imports alphabetically (chrono before fcp_crypto)
- Add line breaks in function signatures for readability
- Fix whitespace in test setup functions
- Align with cargo fmt output

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
